fact_registry.fact: Compound interest is the interest on a loan or deposit calculated based on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods.

character_bible.name: Alex
character_bible.description: A beginner investor who is cautious but curious.
character_bible.arc: From hesitant saver to confident investor.

callback_index.content: The snowball effect mentioned in Chapter 1

examples: Think of your money like a small snowball at the top of a very long hill.

decision_log.rationale: Comprehensive coverage for beginners without overwhelming them.
